title: ModM47(Мастерская47)
description: Mod for the new season of Lololoshka M47.
body:
### Description
Add English language
The mod adds a couple of items from the new season of Lololoshka Workshop 47 (M47)
> - What's in the mod:
- Added System Enemy!
- Added a new Broken Block
- Added the Formica Sword (Reworked)
- Added the Strange Sword
- Added Functionality to the Strange Sword!
- Removed the Crystal
> **- Subscribe to [TGK](https://t.me/mrpetik) the authors of the models. I just made the mod, and they made the models and are posting them online!**
**English language available!**
**IMPORTANT: THIS MOD REQUIRES GEKOOLIB 4.4.2**
